name: TOP_TARGETPAIRS_BY_TECHCLASS1_FAMILY_COUNT
description: Top target pairs by TechnologyClass1 category family count. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)<-[:HAS_PATENT]-(fam:Family)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT fam) AS family_count
ORDER BY family_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: Within the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, which target pairs have the most patent families? Please return the top 10.
For the Other functional combination TechnologyClass1 category, rank the target pairs by patent-family count and return the top 10.
Which target pairs in the Piggybacking TechnologyClass1 category have the most patent families?
